title: Poisson Distribution
description: Counting events over time or space.

lessons.title: Poisson Process
lessons.content:
## Poisson Process

Events occur independently at constant average rate λ.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Poisson PMF
lessons.content:
## Poisson PMF

P(X=x) = e^(-λt)(λt)^x / x!.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Mean and Variance
lessons.content:
## Mean and Variance

Both equal λt.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.

lessons.title: Poisson as Binomial Limit
lessons.content:
## Poisson as Binomial Limit

When n is large and p is small, Binomial → Poisson.

### Key Points

- Study this topic carefully with the interactive examples.
- Practice related questions in the practice section.
- Use the step-by-step solutions when you get stuck.

### Formula

For this topic, refer to the Formula Sheet in the Tools section.
